ci_attestation_subject: Other8 S2PBT03 makes render writes content-hash no-op and supports single-view selection.
summary: S2PBT03 prevents repeated render writes when content is unchanged and allows selecting one human entry view, reducing unnecessary file churn and token/CI scope expansion.

Pull-request workflow currently still runs the full governance test suite; the existing Serenity-Alipay semantic extractor mismatch remains a PR CI blocker until S2PC CI stratification or semantic registry remediation.
self_reference_policy: content_tree_hash excludes this manifest because a file cannot contain its own final hash before commit; changed_files_actual includes this manifest for diff coverage.
